title: 7 Energy Stocks That Will Rise With Oil Prices
text: When investors look for relative strength assets, energy stocks are one of the few groups that have been strong all year. The post 7 Energy Stocks That Will Rise With Oil Prices appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Oil Breaks the $100 Barrier After 7 Years on Ukraine Crisis
text: With crude's ascent to $100, energy companies like Halliburton (HAL), Occidental Petroleum (OXY) and Marathon Oil (MRO) have seen solid gains this year.

title: Halliburton Names Tobi Young and Earl Cummings to Board of Directors
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) today announced the addition of Ms. Tobi Young and Mr. Earl Cummings to its board of directors. The appointments went into effect on February 23, 2022, and both will stand for election by shareholders at the annual meeting on May 18, 2022. “Tobi and Earl bring a wealth of experience to our Board that includes leading roles in the private and public sector, entrepreneurship, technology, and governance,” said Jeff Miller, Halliburton chair

title: 4 Oilfield Services Stocks to Gain From the Prospering Industry
text: With drillers returning to the oil patches, demand for oilfield services has improved significantly, making outlook for the Zacks Oil and Gas- Field Services industry bright again. Among the frontrunners that will possibly make the most of the improving business scenario are SLB, HAL, BKR and RES.
